title: wealth_stock_analysis (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `wealth_stock_analysis`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing wealth schema for `wealth_stock_analysis` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Price, rating, dividend, PE, 'buy call' are not neutral facts — they move behavior.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every wealth_stock_analysis output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
